case_title: DAVID CASTILLO VS. SOUTHWEST SECURITIES, INC

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID CASTILLO'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
